literal-translation: And also to Abel brother of him and not looked Yahweh to Cain and to offering of him and burned-hot to Cain very and fell faces of him.
And said Yahweh to Cain why burned-hot to you and why fell faces of you.
If you do-well not lifting and if not you do-well at the door sin crouching and to you desire of it and you shall rule in it.
And said Cain to Abel brother of him and was in being them in the field and rose Cain to Abel brother of him and killed him.
And said Yahweh to Cain where Abel brother of you and he said not I know seeker of brother of me I.
And he said what you have done voice of bloods of brother of you crying to me from the ground.
And now cursed you from the ground which opened mouth of it to take the bloods of brother of you from hand of you.
When you till the ground not it shall add to give strength of it to you fugitive and wanderer you shall be in the earth.
And said Cain to Yahweh great iniquity of me from lifting.
Behold you have driven me today from faces of the ground and from faces of you I shall be hidden and I shall be fugitive and wanderer in the earth and was all finding me shall kill me.
And said to him Yahweh therefore all killing Cain sevenfold he shall be avenged and set Yahweh to Cain sign to not killing him any finding him.
And went out Cain from faces of Yahweh and dwelt in land of Nod east of Eden.
And knew Cain woman of him and she conceived and bore Enoch and he was building city and called name of the city according to name of son of him Enoch.
And was born to Enoch Irad and Irad begat Mehujael and Mehujael begat Methushael and Methushael begat Lamech.
And took to him Lamech two women name of the one Adah and name of the second Zillah.
And bore Adah Jabal he was father of dweller of tent and cattle.
And name of brother of him Jubal he was father of all handling lyre and pipe.
And Zillah also she bore Tubal-cain sharpener of every craftsman of bronze and iron and sister of Tubal-cain Naamah.
And said Lamech to women of him Adah and Zillah hear voice of me women of Lamech give-ear to speech of me because man I have killed to wound of me and boy to bruise of me.
Because sevenfold shall be avenged Cain and Lamech seventy and seven.
